svg.title: NetFlow — Complete System Architecture
svg.desc: Full-stack architecture diagram showing browser frontend, FastAPI backend, AI pipeline, external APIs, and IndexedDB storage
svg.text: Complete System Architecture · The Prompt Engineers Spring 2026
INDEXEDDB — netflow_db v1 | Browser local storage | Zero dependencies
username PK | passwordHash SHA-256 | role | createdAt | displayName
id auto PK | username idx | ts idx | success bool | reason?
id auto PK | username idx | prompt | params | resultCount | ts
Token reduction 6 fields vs full dict → −70%
TTL cache FRED 1hr · RentCast 15min → 0 API calls
